source_pr.title: expression: fix data race in the collationInfo
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #30488

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

disable parallel for ```TestLower``` and ```TestUpper```.
